T-001, T-002, T-004 titles/scopes address one coherent concern each with no concern-joining 'and'. T-003's title ('Verify panelist-input bundle completeness and add pre-panel readiness') joins two sub-deliverables (Stream 3a completeness check in prepare-panelist-input.{sh,ps1}, REQ-003; Stream 3b readiness step in cross-model-verify/SKILL.md, REQ-004) that do not literally fit the test-tied or housekeeping carve-outs. However, requirements.md Main Workflows item 3 (line 449-451) and design.md (line 628-629) explicitly authorize combining them ('may land together... Phase 2 task decomposition decides the split, not this spec'), and T-003's own Risk Rationale (tasks.md:626-633) argues both target the SAME retrospective evidence-completeness gap (INV-011) with 'no independent value' if split. Treated as one coherent evidence-completeness-gate concern per spec-level authorization, not a forbidden unrelated-feature bundling -- flagged here for downstream visibility given the closer judgment call.

Grep of tasks.md confirms no forbidden vague phrasing ('ensure', 'consider', 'works correctly', 'verify is correct') appears anywhere in Done-When items. Every non-documentation-only task (all 4) includes at least one Done-When item naming a concrete verification artifact/command: TEST-NNN IDs throughout, plus 'implementation report' + 'independent quality-gate verdict records PASS' (e.g. tasks.md:377-382,572-577,826-833,1042-1049).
